title: Principal Plant Manager at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
